project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-108 - MFC
comment: Welltec have run their cutter, performed creep tests and are now correlating for the cut. An online meeting was held by TCO to review the correlation and confirm the cut depth and the goahead has been given to proceed. A further MFC24 run will follow the cutting run to confirm the cut depth and evaluate the cut.
